since_last: 38% of 86 AI names green; Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads +2.23%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 38% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.33% · BTC +2.45% · Gold -0.58% · Nasdaq100 -0.50%. 38% of 86 AI names are green — broad selling. Chip Equipment & AI Hardware is doing the heavy lifting at +2.23%.

cards.headline: Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads, Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at +2.23%; weakest is Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical at -2.07%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: SMCI is the standout at +14.09%
cards.body: Leaders: SMCI +14.09%, VRT +3.86%, MU +3.56%, NXPI +3.51%, DLR +3.51%. Laggards: SPCX -9.22%, AVAV -8.55%, ARM -7.20%, GOOGL -5.84%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -9.22% at $167.94
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -9.22% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
